CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-03-2018 Continued To Oct-03-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-10-2018 Overruled
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Attorney Ciaran O'Sullivan for Defendant Pierre Andrada the moving party.

Attorney Joseph K. Bravo for Plaintiff David Banyard the opposing party.

After hearing arguments from both parties in the matter of DEFENDANT PIERRE ANDRADA's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT; The Court takes this matter under submission.
Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Recorded. (501)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-24-2018 Continued To Jul-31-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT PIERRE ANDRADA's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is continued to July 31, 2018 at 9:30 am to be heard in department 501, the real property/housing court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR# 8600 =(302/HK)
